# GitHub Copilot instructions

This repository uses [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) as the single, canonical source of agent instructions.

**Follow [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md).** It references [`TRELLIS.md`](../TRELLIS.md) (bootstrap manifesto) and
[`standard/README.md`](../standard/README.md) (the standard).

This file is a thin pointer (Trellis rule #8: single source of truth). Do not restate rules here - change
`AGENTS.md` instead.

Build & verify: `npm install`, `npm test`, `npm run selfcheck`.
